name: Vegetable Salad Russe
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the frozen vegetables according to package instructions.
2. Drain and cool the cooked vegetables.
3. In a large bowl, gently mix together the green onions, celery, cucumber, sharp French dressing, mayonnaise, chili sauce, and tabasco sauce.
4. Add the cooled cooked vegetables to the bowl and stir until well combined.
5. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate overnight to allow the flavors to blend.
Serves 6.
